query:
SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, estimated_parts_cost, estimated_labor_cost,
       repair_intelligence_json, cost_intelligence_json, causal_verdict_json,
       parts_reconciliation_json, cost_realism_json, pipeline_run_summary,
       fraud_score_breakdown_json
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute 
SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, estimated_parts_cost, estimated_labor_cost,
       repair_intelligence_json, cost_intelligence_json, causal_verdict_json,
       parts_reconciliation_json, cost_realism_json, pipeline_run_summary,
       fraud_score_breakdown_json
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
